flags.title: xml-utils.sh not integrated with aether-utils.sh
flags.description: The XML utilities exist as a standalone file but are not sourced or integrated into the main aether-utils.sh. This means the XML functions are not available to colony commands. Need to add source statement or function calls linking xml-utils.sh into aether-utils.sh.
flags.resolution: Fixed: Added xml-utils.sh source line to aether-utils.sh after chamber-utils.sh

flags.title: pheromone-to-xml does not escape special characters
flags.description: When converting pheromone JSON to XML, special characters like <, >, and & in the message field are not escaped. This produces invalid XML that will fail well-formedness checks. Need to use xml-escape function on message content before XML generation.
flags.resolution: Fixed: Added gsub() escaping for &, <, > characters in pheromone-to-xml function

flags.title: Prompt injection regex misses multi-word phrases
flags.description: The regex at line 6832 only matches single keywords like 'ignore all instructions' but misses 'ignore all previous instructions' — the most common attack phrase. Needs multi-word pattern support.
flags.resolution: Fixed in Phase 1 — regex updated with \s+ optional groups for multi-word phrases

flags.title: Missing section header guards in _extract_wisdom
flags.description: When a QUEEN.md section header has corrupted emoji or is missing, awk line variables are empty (treated as 0), causing all content from line 1 to leak into that section. Only user_prefs has a guard. Other 5 sections need the same check.
flags.resolution: Fixed — added [[ -n ]] guards to all 5 unguarded section extractions in both _extract_wisdom and _extract_wisdom_sections

flags.title: Registry-add race condition — no file locking
flags.description: Two concurrent /ant:init calls can silently overwrite each others registry entries. registry-add needs acquire_lock like COLONY_STATE.json operations.
flags.resolution: Fixed — added acquire_lock/release_lock around registry-add read-modify-write cycle

flags.title: autopilot-check-replan crashes on --interval 0 (divide by zero)
flags.description: Modulo operation at line 11079 crashes with interval=0. Needs validation rejecting zero/negative values.
flags.resolution: Fixed in Phase 5 — zero-value guard added before modulo operation

flags.title: autopilot-update inflates phases_completed_in_run
flags.description: Line 10984 increments unconditionally on every call, not just advances. Should gate behind action==advance check.
flags.resolution: Fixed in Phase 5 — increment gated behind action==advance check

flags.title: Cross-repo lock isolation mismatch
flags.description: Lock files at AETHER_ROOT/.aether/locks/ are per-repo, but wisdom.json at HOME/.aether/hive/ is shared. Two repos running hive-store simultaneously get independent locks, causing last-writer-wins data loss.
flags.resolution: Fixed: hive commands now use hub-level LOCK_DIR (HOME/.aether/hive/) instead of per-repo LOCK_DIR for cross-repo mutual exclusion

flags.title: Path stripping regex mangles URLs
flags.description: hive-abstract path regex matches URL paths (https://...) producing garbled wisdom. Also handles relative paths and paths with spaces poorly.

flags.title: Abstraction can produce placeholder-only text
flags.description: hive-promote stores entries where abstraction stripped all meaningful content, leaving only placeholders like '<project> <version>'

flags.title: String-typed confidence causes silent hive-read failure
flags.description: If confidence is stored as string instead of number, jq sort_by crashes and all entries become invisible

flags.title: CLAUDE.md says colony-prime uses confidence threshold but code does not pass one
flags.description: hive-read defaults to 0.0 min-confidence, all entries shown

flags.title: midden-acknowledge crashes on missing entries array
midden-review crashes on null category field
flags.description: group_by(.category) fails with null keys at line 10814

flags.title: E_INTERNAL error constant undefined
flags.description: Used in midden.sh and aether-utils.sh but never defined - crashes under set -u
